ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the season in which the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "matchup" TEXT /* Matchup description */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (W or L) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* The location where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* The number of spectators at the game */,
  "overtime" TEXT /* Whether the game went into overtime (Y/N) */,
  "quarter_scores" TEXT /* JSON array of scores for each quarter */,
  "referees" TEXT /* JSON array of referee names */,
  "tv_network" TEXT /* The TV network that broadcast the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference to which the team belongs */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* The year the team was founded */,
  "arena" TEXT /* The home arena of the team */,
  "coach" TEXT /* The name of the head coach */,
  "assistant_coaches" TEXT /* JSON array of assistant coach names */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* JSON array of team colors */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference FOREIGN KEY ("conference") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the season */,
  "playoff_teams" TEXT /* JSON array of team IDs that made the playoffs */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the team that won the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player stat entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which the stats were recorded */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "min" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "tov" INTEGER /* Turnovers made by the player */,
  "pf" INTEGER /* Personal fouls committed by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating for the player */,
  "fgm" INTEGER /* Field goals made */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted */,
  "fg3m" INTEGER /* Three-point field goals made */,
  "fg3a" INTEGER /* Three-point field goals attempted */,
  "ftm" INTEGER /* Free throws made */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted */,
  "reb" INTEGER /* Rebounds */,
  "off_reb" INTEGER /* Offensive rebounds */,
  "def_reb" INTEGER /* Defensive rebounds */,
  "double_doubles" INTEGER /* Number of double-doubles */,
  "triple_doubles" INTEGER /* Number of triple-doubles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The player's date of birth */,
  "height" INTEGER /* The player's height in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* The player's weight in pounds */,
  "position" TEXT /* The player's primary position */,
  "college" TEXT /* The college the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* The year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* The draft pick number */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of NBA experience */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* The player's jersey number */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* JSON object with links to the player's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "conference_type" TEXT /* Type of conference (e.g., EAST, WEST) */,
  "division_names" TEXT /* JSON array of division names within the conference */,
  "conference_champion_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the team that won the conference championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "offensive_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offensive rating entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which the rating was calculated */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team for which the rating applies */,
  "offense_rating" REAL /* Offensive rating for the team */,
  "offense_efficiency" REAL /* Offensive efficiency rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offensive_ratings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offensive_ratings_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defensive_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defensive rating entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which the rating was calculated */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team for which the rating applies */,
  "defense_rating" REAL /* Defensive rating for the team */,
  "defense_efficiency" REAL /* Defensive efficiency rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defensive_ratings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defensive_ratings_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "net_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each net rating entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which the rating was calculated */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team for which the rating applies */,
  "net_rating" REAL /* Net rating for the team */,
  "net_efficiency" REAL /* Net efficiency rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_net_ratings_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_net_ratings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game log entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game linked to this log */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team linked to this log */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game */,
  "record" TEXT /* Current win-loss record for the team */,
  "streak" TEXT /* The team's current win/loss streak */,
  "home_or_away" TEXT /* Whether the game was played at home or away (H/A) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* The user's email address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* The user's phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "season_id" TEXT /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the team */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* The player's jersey number for the season */,
  "status" TEXT /* The player's status (e.g., active, injured, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
